g.text: Screen-by-screen UI wireframes: navigation, tab layout & features per module
Features: live KPI tiles • trend arrows • click-through to module
Row actions: 👁 View ✎ Edit 🗑 Delete • Carbon Transactions auto-generated from Purchase/Manufacturing/Fleet/Expenses
Compliance Issues raised from Audits — severity-tagged, resolution tracked
⑥ Reports: Analytics & Custom Report Builder
Executive overview: all 4 scores + dept comparison
Require evidence for all CSR activities
Email alerts for new compliance issues
